name: wp-neural-admin
description: A privacy-first AI Site Reliability Engineer running entirely in the browser via WebLLM and the WordPress Abilities API.

scripts.dist: npm run clean && npm run build && rm -f wp-neural-admin.zip && zip -r wp-neural-admin.zip -@ < .distpackage
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css

author: Pluginslab
